text:
Once upon a time in a quiet little village on the edge of starlit woods...

There lived an owl named Olive. Olive didn't do much. She didn't hunt hard. She seldom slept. Occasionally she'd listen to a rustle rustling through the trees. But those were just stars.

One twilight she heard chatting. It wasn't stars. A flock of sparrows. They seemed excited. This was the biggest oak they'd ever seen. They chattered about its shiny brown bark.

Olive listened. It was learning English. "Aren't you cute?"

She blinked.

"No. You..."

"Chirpy little bird."

After a while they flew away.

Olive didn't care. She just kept listening. Then came a voice.

"Where find nest?"

"Lazuru."

"Best nest." They flew closer.

"That."

"Just a burrow."

"Look!"

A nest! Little birds hopped inside.

Olive watched.

"Wow."

The sparrows came
